title: Display a map
description: A basemap and an initial viewpoint.

title: Change viewpoint
description: Animate the map to a new viewpoint at runtime.

title: Web map
description: Load a web map from a portal item.

title: Graphics
description: Draw a point, polyline and polygon on a graphics overlay.

title: Feature layer
description: Add a feature service layer to the map.

title: Map image layer
description: Add a dynamic, server-rendered map image layer.

title: WMS layer
description: Add an OGC WMS layer by service URL and layer name.

title: KML layer
description: Add a KML layer from a remote feed.

title: Group layer
description: Group child layers into a single unit.

title: Feature collection
description: Build an in-memory layer from a schema + features.

title: Class-breaks renderer
description: Style a feature layer with graduated symbols by a field.

title: Labels
description: Label a feature layer with an Arcade expression.

title: Clustering
description: Reduce dense features into clusters.

title: Text symbol
description: Draw a labeled point with a text symbol.

title: Picture fill
description: Fill a polygon by tiling an image.

title: Display a scene
description: A 3D scene with terrain and a camera.

title: Web scene
description: Load a 3D web scene from a portal item.

title: Scene layer
description: Add a 3D object scene layer (buildings).

title: Light and shadows
description: Sun lighting with cast shadows over a scene.

title: Query features
description: Count features matching a SQL where clause.

title: Query statistics
description: Compute an aggregate statistic over a layer.

title: Identify
description: Identify the feature under a tap.

title: Popups
description: Read an evaluated popup (title + fields) under a tap.

title: Edit features
description: Add, move and delete features on an editable service.

title: Geometry editor
description: Interactively sketch geometry and measure it.

title: Buffer
description: Geodesic buffer and coordinate formatting.

title: Geocode
description: Forward-geocode an address to a point.

title: Suggest
description: Autocomplete a partial search.

title: Route
description: Solve a route and read its metrics.

title: Device location
description: Show a moving position from a simulated source.

title: Viewshed
description: Draw what is visible from an observer over terrain.

title: Line of sight
description: Test visibility between an observer and a target.

title: Geoprocessing
description: Run a geoprocessing task and draw its result.

title: Utility network
description: Load a utility network and run traces.

title: Offline map
description: Generate an on-demand offline map and display it.

title: Dynamic entity layer
description: Stream live moving entities from a stream service.

title: Authentication
description: Token login, OAuth sign-in and sign-out.

title: Visual variables
description: Data-driven marker size and color from a feature attribute.

title: Composite symbol
description: Stack several symbols into one.

title: Display filter
description: Hide features client-side with a where-clause, no re-query.

title: Geodesic shapes
description: Build a geodesic ellipse and sector on the spheroid.

title: Camera controller
description: Orbit a fixed target with an orbit camera controller.

title: Suggestion round-trip
description: Geocode a chosen autocomplete suggestion precisely via its id.
